summary: Comprehensive testing of DieselExpress fuel delivery app completed. Backend APIs working at 90.9% success rate, frontend fully functional with complete user journey tested: landing page → registration → login → dashboard → order history navigation.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 403 instead of expected 401 when accessed without authentication token
minor_issues.impact: Functionality works correctly, just different status code

passed_tests: Landing page loads with French text content
User registration flow (particulier type) with all required fields
User login flow with registered user credentials
Dashboard displays user stats and welcome message
Order history page displays correctly with empty state
Backend API /api/pricing endpoint returns correct pricing data
Backend API /api/auth/register creates new users successfully
Backend API /api/auth/me returns user profile data
Backend API /api/orders CRUD operations work correctly
Backend API order status updates function properly
Backend API order cancellation works as expected
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fix: Backend should return 401 (not 403) for unauthorized access to protected endpoints. Order creation wizard flow should be tested with a logged-in user session due to authentication token expiration during testing.
